claim: No Stable, complete conformance, manual assistive-technology, or distribution parity claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: article with optional header, metadata and action footer
semantics.rolePolicy: The message role is text context, never a fabricated ARIA role.

keyboard.behavior: Moves through consumer-supplied links and actions in document order.

nonColor: Role and delivery state are available as stable attributes and optional visible text; color is never the sole cue.
responsive: Long selectable content wraps and the user message alignment collapses without page overflow.
security: The component never parses Markdown or uses dangerouslySetInnerHTML. Consumers must sanitize any renderer that does.
consumerResponsibilities: Provide localized author, role, time and action labels.
Sanitize untrusted rich-content adapters before passing React nodes.
Do not claim Stable until current automated and manual evidence exists.
